title: viola odorata var. jucunda
intro: Viola odorata var. jucunda, also known as the sweet-scented violet, is a subspecies of the fragrant violet plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola odorata var. jucunda include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves and steeping them in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
